context: Tests whether the agent uses NFCTagReaderSession correctly for native tag protocols and preserves the payment-card boundary.

checklist.name: Uses tag session
checklist.description: Uses `NFCTagReaderSession` for native ISO 7816, ISO 15693, MIFARE, and FeliCa access.

checklist.name: ISO14443 mapping
checklist.description: Maps `.iso14443` to ISO 7816-compatible and MIFARE tags.

checklist.name: Connect first
checklist.description: Connects to a detected tag before sending protocol commands.

checklist.name: Switches tag cases
checklist.description: Switches over `NFCTag` cases for ISO 7816, ISO 15693, MIFARE, and FeliCa.

checklist.name: Multi-tag handling
checklist.description: Handles multiple detected tags by prompting removal and restarting polling rather than blindly processing all tags.

checklist.name: Payment boundary
checklist.description: States that `NFCTagReaderSession` does not support payment-related AIDs.

checklist.name: Payment route
checklist.description: Routes eligible EU payment use cases to `NFCPaymentTagReaderSession` instead of generic tag sessions.
